ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the school belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the principal */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the school can accommodate */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, middle, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the district */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the district */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  "superintendent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the superintendent */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Total number of schools in the district */,
  "student_population" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Current grade of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the student */,
  "parent_guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent or guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the parent or guardian */,
  "home_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken at home */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Indicates if the student has any special needs (e.g., IEP, 504 plan) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student first enrolled in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes about the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, withdrawn) */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level at the time of enrollment */,
  "enrollment_type" TEXT /* Type of enrollment (e.g., new student, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity or test */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of participation */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of participation (e.g., participated, absent) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity or test */,
  "activity_category" TEXT /* Category of the activity (e.g., academic, extracurricular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., test, project) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* How often the activity is conducted (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity or test */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for participating in the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date of the score */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the score (e.g., proficient, not proficient) */,
  "grading_scale" TEXT /* Grading scale used for the score (e.g., A-F, 0-100) */,
  "score_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the score (e.g., comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_proficiency_level FOREIGN KEY ("proficiency_level") REFERENCES proficiency_levels ("proficiency_level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proficiency_levels" (
  "proficiency_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proficiency level */,
  "proficiency_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the proficiency level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proficiency level */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Score threshold for the proficiency level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proficiency_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Educational standard the test is based on (e.g., Common Core) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* How often the test is conducted (e.g., annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "test_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the score */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_category" TEXT /* Category of the test (e.g., diagnostic, summative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnicity */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "parent_guardian_education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "sharing_options" TEXT /* Options for sharing the report (e.g., email, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the detail */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report detail */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data value (e.g., percentage, number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
